subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Mihdi was favoured with special spiritual bounties, and after Áqá Muḥammad-'Alí - upon him be the glory of his Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب مهدی بعنایات روح مخصوص بوده و بعد آنکه آقا محمد علی علیه بهاء ربه ان
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @power of the Manifestation of God, @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
